chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 414 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA 1918/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 14.05.2025. Mr. Qurban Ali Malano Advocate for Petitioner. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah D.A.G along with Bharat Kumar Assistant Director/I.O FIA CTW, Karachi. *********** Bharat Kumar Assistant Director / Investigating Officer FIA CTW, Karachi files statement along with certain documents, taken on record. After going through the same counsel for petitioner does not press the petition and submits that he will approach the trial Court for redressal of his grievance. The petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
